name: Car Chasing
description: Get ready for an action-packed racing adventure in Car Chasing GM, the ultimate high-speed car chase game filled with thrilling missions, intense racing action, and endless driving excitement. Drive powerful sports cars, escape from rivals, and chase enemies across highways, city roads, and dangerous tracks in this adrenaline-pumping car simulator. Experience realistic driving physics, smooth controls, and stunning HD graphics that make every race feel exciting and immersive. Speed through traffic, perform amazing drifts, avoid obstacles, and unlock new cars as you complete challenging missions. Every level brings new excitement, faster oppo
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
